description: Sandal-style wedges from catwalk for the desi diva. These shoes are synonymous with good taste and practicality with their durable straps and stylish wedge-heels. Wear this with denims, a kurti and matching accessories. You can also wear this with casual churidhars. Upper Braided thong straps with a rubber toe separator Midfoot straps criss-crossing through the thong straps Soft, padded footbed with stitch detailing and a heel patch Outsole TPR outsole with wedged heel and textured patterning on the heel and forefoot for grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
